description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for generators for which the angle differs from the angular average by more than a specified threshold. Scanning, if enabled, will be done for all machines whose machine MVA is greater than the specified value This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = set_genang_3(status, angle, mbase, trip) ierr, status, angle, mbase, trip = set_genang_3()
python_syntax: ierr = set_genang_3(status, angle, mbase, trip) ierr, status, angle, mbase, trip = set_genang_3()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: Value of the deviation threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: mbase
parameters.description: Machine size (mva). (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive). All machines whose MVAR ratings are above this threshold will be scanned).

parameters.name: trip
parameters.description: Monitor trip flag. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive). All machines whose MVAR ratings are above this threshold will be scanned).

status.description: enable scanning for generators exceeding angle threshold.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
